caribbean.headline: Caribbean Seas Remain Calm
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing 15 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and a 39% rain probability, while St. Lucia has 0 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with dominant swell direction from ESE and a swell period of 6 s, affecting marine activities in the Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing 16 kt winds with 5.8 ft wave heights and a 65% rain probability, while nearby Venice has 11 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail throughout the day, with the Central Mediterranean remaining under the influence of a dominant westerly swell direction and less than 10% rain probability not being a factor in this specific forecast, as areas like Dubrovnik are seeing a notable 65% rain probability.
